name: Supreme Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
1 package (6 oz) semi-sweet chocolate pieces, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cookie crumbs and 1/4 cup melted margarine; press into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and milk. Mix on medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time to the mixture, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Blend in chocolate and vanilla extract. Pour over the crust.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
6. Loosen the sides of the cake from the rim of the pan before cooling.
7. In another bowl, beat together 1/3 cup melted margarine and powdered sugar until light and fluffy.
8. Add chocolate pieces and liqueur, mixing well.
9. Frost the top and sides of the cheesecake.
10. Chill the cheesecake in the refrigerator.
